Still lost substantial investment (truck valuation) but if it weren't for the persistent efforts of Daryoush Zolfaghari dealing with everyone (medical professionals, insurance agencies- particularly the at-fault driver's), don't know how would have been able to move forward (figuratively and literally). Couldn't have been more timely and needed as it is right now! HIGHLY recommend his services if ever find oneself in a similar situation. What an awesome accident attorney!

reviews.ownerResponse: Due to attorney client privilege we cannot address the review other than to say it is a mischaracterization and that we unequivocally do NOT work for insurance companies. We also do NOT receive kickbacks from insurance companies.

I was involved in a car accident several months ago. The person who hit me had no license or insurance. I was significantly injured and didn’t know where to start. I found it impossible to navigate the insurance company and had never hired an attorney before. I’m older and didn’t know who I could trust. Meyers and Burnett came highly recommended. This recommendation saved me. My first interaction was with Mark Meyers. He instantly made me feel comfortable, he told me not to worry and he would handle it. Mark, along with his staff took care of everything. They scheduled my appointments, checked in on me often and I knew that I had the best care. Along the way I met Mark Burnett, he is just as wonderful as Mark Meyers. Mr. Burnett finished my case expertly with a fantastic outcome. These two men are truly outstanding, knowledgeable attorneys and fantastic, caring people. I’m very fortunate to have had them both fighting for me. They will take care of you. You can count on it.
Really great working with Mark, he kept me informed and made everything as stress free as possible. He was able to get me help when I really needed it. Thanks Mark!

I was so lucky to have Mark Burnett work on my case. Without his help, I 100% would have lost money... but he ensured that I received everything I deserved. He is knowledgeable, punctual, thorough, and a genuinely good person. I can't say enough positive things about him. Thanks again, Mark!

In January, I was hit by a driver who ran a red light; my car was totaled, my back severely injured, and the driver's insurance company was refusing to assist with any medical treatment or fair evaluation for my vehicle's value. When I was referred to Mark Burnett, my initial thought was dreading the hassle and legal hoops I might experience building my case... I was wrong! Mark is THE BEST!!! Not only did he show compassion when discussing the incident and my injuries, but he made it his priority to get me the care I needed immediately - despite not knowing the outcome of my case. Mark coordinated all of my medical care, spoke to insurance on my behalf, and managed the financial side of everything (I didn't see a single bill). My case was settled early December, and the result was their insurance giving me everything I needed to cover my expenses and more! Thank you so much Mark & team, I can't thank you enough for turning a horrible circumstance into a wonderful experience.
Great, honest attorneys.  These are lawyers you can count on and trust when you need them.
Mark Burnett is someone who actually cares. He puts your needs, as the client, well above his own.

He's courteous, informative, insightful, humorous at times, but overall he was all about Me, My recovery and best interests. To me, nothing is more noble. Praise Jesus for guiding me to Attorney Reza Williams. I was facing a very stressful situation with my case and didn’t know how it would turn out. Through God’s grace and Reza’s help, the case was dismissed and a huge weight was lifted off my shoulders.

Reza was patient, professional, and truly cared about helping me through the process. What felt overwhelming at first ended with a great outcome, and I’m incredibly thankful.

I truly believe Jesus placed Reza in my path during a difficult time. Thank you, Reza, and all praise to Jesus for seeing me through.

I wanted to share my experience in regards to Mr Williams. I unfortunately was involved in a sticky situation where I cosigned for a lease on an apartment, but the tenants living there at the apartment were not able to pay the rent. We ended up in court, I had done a good deed and it backfired. I was gonna be stuck with a bad record and it would affect my credit. Mr. Williams asked the other Party for my name to be dismissed since I was not physically living there, but they would not do it. But by the grace of God, the other parties Heart was persuade into dismissing my name auntie the exact date that we Settled.I truly believe the Lord was the one that made this happen. Mr. William had prayed about this case, and before falling into the hands of law, he falls into the hands of God. He lets the spirit guide him and navigating each case. Mr. Williams, as an attorney placed the Lord in the center of his case and he is highly favored within Mr. Williams.
I want to say thank you because you were very kind and patient with this case. I asked the Lord to keep blessing you and that you may be an instrument to the community and to us the people.

REZA WILLIAMS came highly recommended...

I was confident Reza would win my case during our initial phone conversation. Evident to me was his knowlege of law and his wisdom, his trial experience and his dedication to each individual case and client.
We went over my case in person and Reza was adroit with details and truly compassionate with my situation and personal matter.
I quickly came to know him as an excellent and unique attorney with a mindful strategy to win my case.
I gave Reza minimal time to prepare & file, and he did an immaculate job whilst communicating each detail with me and filing promptly.
On the morning of trial I was hardly nervous knowing Reza was on my side and he has a record for winning difficult cases for his clients.
Reza presented my case with his expert mediation skills, personability and knowlege of law, and my court case was resolved during trial in my favor.
I'm Blessed and grateful  for Attorney Reza Williams.

I give all glory to God for sending me his faithful servant Reza to be my attorney. He is very knowledgeable with all local laws, and he is able to work every angle to meet his client’s needs. The charge for his services were very reasonable. I was facing a tough case, but I was able to receive no judgment against me with a record sealed. Mr. Williams took his time to explain the ins and outs of my case. He was also able to properly negotiate with both parties, as we were able to come to reconciliation ourselves. Mr. Williams was a Faithful Advocate for me in the courtroom, and he took the time to pray for me and help build back up my faith. He truly cares for each of his clients.

Praise Jesus for Attorney Reza and all his dedication. My family and me are truly forever grateful for Reza and the Faithful Advocate for their transparency, honesty, humanity, and empathy during a difficult time. Words cannot express how thankful we are to have encountered Reza as we experienced tremendous stress and heartbreak. Through the grace of God and Reza’s commitment, he was able to bring us peace and many blessings. What felt like impossible, God answered all of our prayers through Reza and made a miracle come true. I would recommend him to any family or friends time and time again!

Reza, thank you so much for your exceptional work and unwavering dedication on my case. Your expertise, professionalism, and clear communication made an incredibly stressful situation much easier to navigate, and I truly felt supported every step of the way. I am deeply grateful for the time, care, and skill you invested, and I appreciate the outstanding outcome you helped achieve. Your commitment made all the difference, and I cannot thank you enough for your remarkable service.

I had a very positive experience working with this lawyer. They were highly communicative between myself and the other party and took my case seriously from the start. They were friendly, professional, and thorough in explaining how the case worked and what steps were needed for resolution. I appreciated the clear discussion of available options and the focus on resolving the matter efficiently and in a timely manner. I would confidently recommend their services.

Praise Jesus for leading us to The Faithful Advocate and Attorney Reza Williams. We were on the verge of losing our building and didn’t know what to do. Through God’s grace and Reza’s guidance, compassion, and persistence, our company was protected and given a second chance.
Reza treated us with care, and helped us navigate something that could have shut us down. This experience was more than legal help, it was an answered prayer. We truly believe Jesus worked through Reza to help save our company. We are forever grateful. Thank you, Reza, and praise Jesus for placing you in our path.

There aren't words that exist that would describe Reza. He is very honest, realistic, kind, and easy to work with. He has taken care of me and my small business in ways that nobody else ever has, it is amazing having an attorney that feels like they actually care about you. Having an attorney like this along with Jesus standing alongside us has truly been a blessing, I can't speak enough about how grateful I am. God is great and I thank him constantly for sending Reza to us.

We are incredibly grateful for the help we received from Reza.He is truly a man of God, and we believe it was no accident that we were guided to him during such a difficult time. God answered our prayers through this man, and we could feel his compassion, integrity, and commitment throughout the process. If you’re looking for someone who not only knows the law but also leads with heart and faith, we highly recommend him.
This gentleman just helped me extremely professional and friendly, thank you so much.

reviews.text:
As a single father of a boy and a girl, finding myself entangled in a legal battle was an overwhelming nightmare. However, thanks to the exceptional legal prowess and genuine compassion of Attorney Neeraj Singh, my life can now continue back on positive trajectory.

From the very first consultation, Attorney Singh demonstrated a level of empathy and understanding that immediately put me at ease. He kept me aware of all the challenges & the actions he would take to help me through the entire case. Not just to the details of the case but also to the underlying concerns and fears that I harbored as a single parent facing serious legal challenges.

What truly sets Attorney Neeraj Singh apart is his unwavering commitment to justice and the well-being of his clients. With remarkable expertise, he navigated the complexities of my case, working tirelessly to secure the best possible outcome for both me and my children. His dedication went beyond the call of duty, ensuring that I was not just a client, but someone whose life he genuinely cared about.

In a legal landscape where compassion can sometimes be overshadowed by the pursuit of success, Attorney Singh stands as a beacon of integrity. He not only reduced the charges against me but, more importantly, kept me out of prison, allowing me to continue providing a stable and loving environment for my son and daughter.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the profound impact Attorney Neeraj Singh has had on our lives. His legal acumen, coupled with his genuine concern for the well-being of my family, is nothing short of extraordinary. If you find yourself in need of legal representation, especially in the realm of criminal law, look no further. Attorney Singh is not just a lawyer; he is a guardian of justice, a champion for families, and a true lifesaver.

Thank you, Mr. Singh, for not only preserving my freedom but for giving my children the chance to grow up with their father by their side. Your stellar representation has earned my deepest respect and eternal gratitude.

reviews.text:
We hired attorney Mohammad Abuershaid for a case of false- allegations by ex-spouse, relying on his  heavily advertised expertise. Based on our very troubling experience, we do not recommend him at all, also not for cases of CPS, Juvenile Dependency, Child Custody or needing Trial Advocacy.

( our review is being taken down repeatedly since Dec 2025 so we are posting again )

We believe critical evidence was not presented in court, which could have altered outcome, requests to introduce evidence were met w/resistance(see) we were repeatedly asked Not to discuss opposing party,attempts to clarify met w/agitation,courtroom approach appeared reserved & quiet,Trial  lacking by ALL Trial Mohammad, Social-workers not cross-examined, testimonies of key professionals not sought; In absence of a Trial, false-allegations went Unchallenged  & sustained.CPS cases rely on Evidence not arguments; case was lost at onset.We were Not informed of Any Settlement details or Implications or Custodial  Rights.

The case unfolded in a way that felt ALIGNED w/Social worker’s  position rather than ours, which was devastating for us.
We waited every min of everyday to have our child,only to
later discover that actual Custody of our only child was Relinquished without our explicit consent at onset,undermining very purpose of retaining legal counsel.Jurisdiction hearing proceeded Uncontested & we did not know.

Later a social-worker informed us that our case resulted in “SUSTAINED  PETITION” so hiring him did not help; actually case became Worse.

Despite this we were charged Big  Flat Fee of $49,500 w/an hourly rate of $1250, needless to say his work did not reflect claims on his website for Parental Rights & Fighting Social-workers.We were charged this much for an hour worth of Undisclosed & Unfavorable settlement(behind our back) remainder of case was procedural not STRATEGIC,like timepass, to justify his billable hrs.

We had no prior knowledge of CPS, felt taken advantage of, felt our Trust was not honored.
We were not provided w/Any court-filed documents (except sw-reports) nor told about appeal.

Transparency was Lacking throughout representation, decisions made WITHOUT our Informed Consent. He appeared to be deciding on his Own, and  it appeared in a way that suited him. Not even one hour was spent in discussing any Strategic Steps(since there were none)

We went to him for defense & felt he himself did not protect us, in a CPS  court which is like Criminal court.

CPS allegations automatically trigger CACI process; however we were told later Mohammad does not handle CACI, not at Retaining.

By now we also became uncertain about Credibility of his online reviews, as many appeared self-fabricated, w/ identical stories(of “one lawyer left & another came in”(see) by interns or posted at exact-same-time by different supposed clients, or Bot-generated, hyper-inflated, virtual offices, this was our perception.
Real-representation appeared not reflective of review-presentation.

After Full fee was collected 2 more charges made to card,later reversed, but added to our concerns.
After his representation ended midway,we did not get refund of unused fee.

Since outcome was not in our favor at all, it left us in a more challenging situation than before his legal assistance; an innocent parent was converted to guilty; we felt "thrown under the bus" by our own Defense attorney.

Ultimately we lost custody of our only child, false-allegations sustained,lost parts of our life irreversibly, lost financially.

We feel a PUBLIC Defender would have been more trusting & accountable.

We being innocent went from Sole to Zero custody.
Our Case-file w/court-Transcripts  was later reviewed by several legal professionals, including CIVIL-Rights & CPS attorneys & many expressed serious concerns about his handling of our case.

We shared our concerns with California STATE Bar.

We wish no one goes thru what we endured w/this cold representation & now r left  reeling from its extremely damaging aftermath.

We share this account so others  can make informed choices.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are deeply saddened to read this review and respectfully disagree with many of the statements made.

Due to our strict ethical and confidentiality obligations as attorneys, we cannot publicly respond to or correct specific factual inaccuracies about any client’s case, including procedural decisions, settlement discussions, or court strategy.

Dependency and CPS proceedings are governed by statutory timelines, evidentiary standards, and judicial findings that are ultimately determined by the court — not by any one attorney. Strategic decisions in these cases are always made within the framework of the law, the court’s rulings, and the client’s legal position at the time.

We categorically deny any allegation that actions were taken without authorization or that fees were charged improperly. Our engagement agreements are detailed, written, and signed prior to representation, and we take informed consent and transparency seriously.

Allegations regarding fabricated reviews or unethical billing practices are entirely false.

We understand that CPS and custody matters are emotionally devastating and life-altering. When outcomes are not what a parent hopes for, it is natural to experience frustration and grief. However, court findings and sustained petitions are based on judicial determinations after review of the evidence presented.

We stand by the integrity of our practice and our commitment to advocating zealously and ethically for every client.

reviews.text:
This is a call to every parent going through a CPS investigation: you do not have to face this alone.

CPS is not on your side. They will say they’re protecting your children, but the system is broken and dangerous — especially for children with special needs. I have two daughters — one 15, one 4 — both on the autism spectrum. I knew from experience how easily CPS misinterprets autism-related behaviors as abuse. I had been investigated before, even when no evidence was ever found. But this time, it escalated fast.

It all began when I reached out to a crisis line for help with my daughter’s autism-related behaviors. Instead of receiving help, I was reported to CPS. The fear became real the moment I saw, through my security camera, a police officer standing at my front door. My heart sank. I couldn’t sleep, terrified my daughters — especially my 4-year-old, who has high needs— could be taken and placed in a system completely unprepared to meet her needs.

The foster care system is not the safety net they portray. Statistics show that up to 1 in 3 children who grow up in foster care end up homeless, incarcerated, or deceased. I knew I had to protect my children — not just from the allegations, but from the system itself.

That’s when I began my search for an attorney. I read countless reviews, and interviewed several. The moment I spoke to Mo, I knew he was the person I needed. When your children are at risk, you don’t search for the cheapest lawyer — you search for the best, the one who can truly protect your family and Mo it is that lawyer.

From the very first consultation, Mo showed incredible kindness, patience, and compassion. Even when I was panicked or overwhelmed, he listened without judgment. Throughout the process, whenever I had questions or fears (and there were many), Mo was always there — answering my calls, responding quickly, and always following through. His availability gave me strength during the darkest time of my life.

Beyond his responsiveness, Mo is sharp, strategic, and extremely knowledgeable. He quickly understood both the legal complexities and the unique needs of my daughters. Most importantly, he didn’t just see a case — he saw my family.

Once CPS realized I had strong legal representation, their entire approach shifted. I truly believe that if I hadn’t hired Mo, and if CPS knew I didn’t have a strong lawyer in my corner, they would have removed my children from my care before I even had a chance to explain myself. That’s how quickly these situations can spiral if you’re unprotected.

I cannot stress this enough: you should never face CPS alone. The system will overwhelm you if you’re unrepresented. Mo stood by my side and gave me the protection and confidence to face what no parent should ever have to endure.

Thankfully, the case ultimately closed. Looking back, I am forever grateful that I found Mo when I did. His representation made all the difference and protected my daughters from a system that could have destroyed them.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mo to any parent facing CPS or child protection matters. If you’re terrified and overwhelmed, please know: you do not have to go through this alone. Mo is brilliant, strategic, compassionate, and fully committed to protecting families when they need it most.

Thank you, Mo, for standing with my family during the most difficult time of our lives. You will always have my deepest gratitude.
reviews.ownerResponse: Your experience is incredibly powerful, and it’s stories like yours that give hope and courage to other parents who feel lost and afraid. We are so grateful you trusted us to help protect your family when it mattered most.  We're honored to have stood by your side!

reviews.ownerResponse:
This is Attorney Troy Monge, and I want to respond to this review.
I pride myself on providing excellent customer service, and I apologize if you were not happy with our services. Based upon the information provided, it is difficult to understand your concerns. If you are someone we could not or would not help, I wish you the best of luck.

However, early on, John Serrano found out that my insurance limitations and the injuring party's insurance limitations were the same, meaning, in my case, everything had to be paid out of the $!00k personal injury limitation. In the end, the neurosurgeon/hospital & lawyer received more compensation than I did, and I'm the one with the life-long injury that will require future surgery.  There was, essentially, nothing in the plan for future medical as I was told initially.  I should have been informed of the potential outcome as soon as the firm was made aware.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, we appreciate your time to give us an account of your case.  We wish that we could have received more for you in your personal injury case; however, in this unique matter, the policy limitations, along with other practical considerations, capped the recovery, as mentioned.  Luckily, we were able to negotiate a significant reduction in your outstanding medical bills (which exceeded the total value of the insurance policies available) and resolved your matter in less than 6 months, keeping costs very low.  Though we wish funds were available so that we could have negotiated a larger settlement, rest assured that we worked hard to provide you with the best possible outcome given the circumstances. reviews.text:
WOW!! Mr. Bidari left an impression on us since the moment we met with him for our free consultation. We knew that he was the right hire for our case and he DEFINITELY proved us right! Words can not describe how appreciative we are with him for what he did for my son and I (potentially life altering). We were hit with a Civil law suit from what was a high profile incident that my son was involved in when he was a minor.
Paymon was one of SIX (6!!) lawyers that we interviewed with before we hired him. Our one hour consultation turned into nearly two hours, not once making us feel like we were wasting his time. Other lawyers we spoke with were short with their answers with out explaining much, a couple of them seemed irritated with the amount of questions we were asking. Others cut us off as we would talk or looked at us as if to ask "dont you know this already", one guy literally cut us off after 30 min to tell us that if we wanted to continue that it would be $150 for an hour, another kept looking at the time as if he had somewhere or had to meet with someone more important than us (this is after he made us wait in the lobby 40 min past our scheduled time) and after we were done he said that we needed to make a decision as to whether we wanted to hire him because he was Very Busy and did'nt need the extra work but that he would take on our case if we wanted. Bidari made us feel comfortable from the get-go with out making any un-realistic promises, other than his promise to work on our case with diligence.
What really sold us was his plan of attack, honesty and most of all his CONFIDENCE. If you have the pleasure of meeting Bidari you will see that for yourself immediately. His confidence made us feel at ease while knowing that we were facing a very very difficult lawsuit to defend. Every lawyer we spoke with ultimately said that our best bet was to Negotiate with the plaintiff in order to try and minimize our losses which could have ran into the Hundreds of Thousands of dollars. In other words, we were facing the possibility of  hiring a lawyer that was only going to negotiate in our behalf.
Bidari, also knew that we had a very difficult case on our hands but he didn't just chalk it up as an automatic loss. He said that he would look at the case in its entirety and not just throw in the towel.... After a couple weeks we filed a motion to dismiss because of some flaws and technicalities that he saw in the case (I strongly feel that none of the other lawyers we interviewed would have caught them) but because of the diligence that he promised he would give our case he was able to deliver and deliver Big Time. Five months after our nightmare began our case was dismissed and we owe it all to Paymon Bidari's dedication and bulldog mentality. Ladies and Gentlemen this man exudes Confidence for a reason.
I am in no way saying that your outcome will be the same as ours (though we were going up a creek without a paddle) but if you have read through this review please believe that it is 100% sincere. YOU OWE IT TO YOURSELF TO SPEAK WITH THIS MAN if you are in need of a Civil defense lawyer!!!

Paymon could have dragged this case out through a Jury trial in order to milk us out of 10's of thousands but he didn't, the case was dismissed before the trial began.

On another note, we were co-defendants along with a School District (which I assume have an army of lawyers). Paymon asked their lawyers if they wanted to get on board with our motion to dismiss but they hesitated. Long story short our case was dismissed and the School district is now the only defendant in the case. Maybe the District should look to Mr. Bidari as their litigation lawyer should they need one in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you. I appreciate you trusting this critically serious case with me and affording me the opportunity of representing your son. I was impressed with how you watched out for your son and supported him when he most needed it. I am very glad of the outcome. Cheers!

reviews.text: Gary was such a pleasure to work with!! He went to bat for my daughter and I who were hit in a car accident. After everything we went through, he helped us get some relief. We are so grateful for his services and highly recommend you go to him for help too!

Gary Peterson did a great job getting the maximum settlement possible for my mother, who was injured as a passenger in a car accident. Gary negotiated with AAA insurance and the medical group to settle the medical bills, and he was able to get everyone to agree to a sizable settlement for my mother. We couldn't be happier. I recommend Gary Peterson to anyone needing a good personal injury attorney.

It’s very difficulty to figure out how to start this review out, but I think the very first thing to mention is how impressed I am with Gary, and how happy I am with the result I received.

I was involved in an automotive accident in 2020, and I possessed a lot of uncertainty, both from a personal and legal perspective. As a recommendation, I was sent in Gary’s direction, and I was more than happy to be sent his way. From the very beginning, Gary demonstrated both his professionalism in resolving the matter and the experience that he has over the plethora of years in the industry.

My personal case had a ton of variables and moving pieces, which is why it took a long time to resolve. Despite the many different factors and degree of difficulty presented in the case, Gary possessed both a logical and aggressive approach. And as a result, he was able to maximize the settlement we received, which is something I am more than content with.

I had a lot of anxiety as it pertained to the case, since I had never undergone anything extensive or as legal as this matter. But no matter the questions I had, and no matter the process, Gary was there every step of the way to help ease the anxiety and answer all the questions that I had.

As an individual, he is a solid person with a strong set of values, and is someone I know I can trust, both in a professional and personal setting.

Moving forward from this point on, I will always recommend Gary to anyone and everybody, as it pertains to personal injury, as I know everyone is in good hands with him.
Great man to work with. Help my son and I with our case would definitely recommend Gary to anyone

Gary Peterson was great! He was always helpful, insightful and honest and it really helps when you're unsure about the whole process and where to even start. He always had my best interest in mind and never treated me like just some file on a desk! Thanks again Mr. Peterson

Gary A. Peterson was extremely professional and easy to work with. He definitely goes the extra mile for his clients.  With years of experience, he was able to guide us when we had questions. Gary recently represented me in hit and run case, he was extremely knowledgeable and professional. Do you self a favor and hire Gary!

I hate to even right this review because this whole experience was so terrible for me. I was recommended Gary from a friend, and I trusted him right away. Gary was very kind and inquisitive about the car accident I was in, which left me with a broken arm. However, as time went on, I found that he had more of an aggressive approach than necessary with the adjuster, and after being told that the writing of my demands was delayed for various reasons (he had too many cases he was working on, the adjuster who wasn't responding, he was in the process of working on it, etc.) and being promised to have had submitted my demands over the course of several months, I finally demanded the written demands that he said he sent – only to find out that he lied to me the whole time. He hadn't even written them up. With my case, which was an open and shut case, he still couldn't find the time to write the demands and send them to the adjuster. It was an absolutely terrible experience. Thankfully, I found another attorney who was able to close the case within a month after I fired Gary.

Gary begged me not to write this – and I will say, I am not writing it out of spite. I am writing this to prevent anyone else from having to go through the same experience I did. I'll admit too – I trusted him too much and should have requested more written documentation, which was my downfall. You can't just trust words over the phone. If you do end up going with Gary, make sure he follows up his "friendly phone calls" with written documentation updates.
reviews.ownerResponse: Lindsey, I am truly sorry you had a bad experience with my firm.  It takes a lot of work to maximize a client’s recovery for his/her injuries and I pride myself on my thoroughness and single-minded determination in working towards that goal in all my cases.  However, sometimes there are extenuating circumstances that can delay the resolution of a case.  As a sole practitioner with over 25 years’ experience in personal injury law all my clients benefit from my experience and the direct access they have to me personally as their attorney.  To that end, I work hard to provide the best service possible to all my clients.  Nonetheless, I am only human, and things occasionally go wrong.  This is why I give all my clients a satisfaction guarantee, or I do not get paid. I am glad things worked out for you in the end and wish you and yours all the best.

reviews.text: I had the pleasure of meeting Jim Nguyen recently, and it was a fantastic experience from start to finish. He's actually on the preferred list at the office I work at because of how well he takes care of patients and clients! He's thorough, responsive, and always looking out for their best interests. Whether it's helping them navigate complex legal situations or just being available to answer questions, Jim goes above and beyond. It's rare finding an attorney who is both sharp and compassionate, but Jim strikes that balance perfectly. I can't recommend him enough!
reviews.ownerResponse: Lawrence, thank you so much for your wonderful feedback and kind words. We truly appreciate your recognition of our commitment to providing exceptional service. It's always our aim to go above and beyond for our clients, and we're delighted to know that you've had such a positive experience. If you need any further assistance, we're here to help.

reviews.text: Working with Ian was great. He was professional, courteous, and patient. He had an easy to understand answer for all my questions and walked me through potential scenarios. Very helpful and kind. Recommend this firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hanna, thank you so much for your kind words and for recommending our firm! We're thrilled to hear that your experience was positive and that all your questions were answered in a way that was easy to understand. We strive to provide professional and courteous service, and we're glad we could be of help to you. We look forward to assisting you in the future if the need arises!

reviews.text: I’ve come across lawyers who don’t show care, are too busy to get back to you, will only put enough effort that makes them a profit. All this added to the existing stress from the initial situation. Working with Ian was the exact opposite. He always responded timely and wouldn’t bs. He was honest on his strengths and would be straightforward if he needed to research more on my questions. That made me feel safe knowing he cares and he’s not just trying to make money with my situation and move on immediately. Highly recommend him and his team
reviews.ownerResponse: Kitty, thank you so much for sharing this. It means a great deal to hear that working with Ian made you feel safe and supported during a stressful time. At Win Nguyen Law, we believe honest communication and genuine care are the foundation of good legal service. We’re grateful for your recommendation and glad Ian and the team could be there for you.

reviews.text: Working with Vy at Win Nguyen Law felt like teaming up with a trusted friend who genuinely cared about my well-being. She took the time to explain every step of the process in clear, everyday language so I never felt lost or overwhelmed. Her constant communication and genuine empathy turned what could have been a stressful ordeal into a smooth, reassuring experience. I always knew someone was fighting for my best interests and guiding me toward the best possible outcome.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jim, thank you for sharing your thoughts!

reviews.text: Ngl i was lost after my car accident, I felt so embrassed and I didnt know what to do. Vy handled my case with absolute professionalism, prioritizing my privacy throughout the entire process. Vy clearly explained each step, kept everything confidential, and secured a great outcome for me. I highly recommend her to anyone looking for trustworthy and effective legal help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Bailey, thank you for taking the time to write a review!

reviews.text: I had a difficult workplace injury, I didn't know where to start and felt completely overwhelmed. Vy jumped in immediately with kindness and clarity, expertly handling every aspect of my workers' compensation case. She kept me informed, reassured, and fought tirelessly to ensure I received the best possible outcome. I'm incredibly grateful for Vy's dedication! she made a tough situation feel manageable and hopeful. Highly recommend her services to anyone needing reliable and compassionate legal support!
reviews.ownerResponse: Jessica, thanks for sharing your thoughts and recommendations!

reviews.text: I don’t often share personal endorsements, but I must express my deep appreciation for Vy, a legal associate. From our very first interaction, her exceptional work ethic and readiness to answer every question—no matter how complex—have truly impressed me. In the short time I’ve known Vy, her sharp intellect and genuine empathy immediately closed any professional distance between us. What began as straightforward legal consultations quickly grew into a valued friendship, thanks to her thoughtfulness, dedication, and wholehearted commitment. Vy’s guidance has not only been professionally indispensable but also personally inspiring.
reviews.ownerResponse: Van, thank you for your thoughtful feedback. Vy’s dedication to providing clear guidance and genuine care is a reflection of the values we prioritize at Win Nguyen Law. We’re glad she was able to support you both professionally and personally!

reviews.text: I’ve worked with Vy on numerous matters, and she consistently impresses me with her deep legal knowledge and thoughtful guidance. Her integrity presents in every recommendation—she never hesitates to deliver honest, well-reasoned advice, even when it’s not what you want to hear. From our very first meeting, Vy’s warmth and approachability put me at ease; she listens attentively, asks clarifying questions, and ensures our conversations cover every angle. Thanks to her professionalism and genuine care, I always feel confident turning to Vy whenever I need clear, dependable counsel on any legal issue.
reviews.ownerResponse: Minh, thank you for the thoughtful feedback.  We are committed to providing honest, well-informed advice, even when it’s not the easiest message to deliver. We’re glad Vy's clear and thorough approach has earned your trust. It’s important to us that you feel confident and supported!

reviews.text: Vy is the kind of person people naturally go to when they need clarity or support--myself included. They're thoughtful, honest, and always take people seriously without making things feel overwhelming. If you ever need help with a personal injury case, I wouldn't hesitate to send someone their way.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thien, thank you so much for your kind words. Vy and the team are so glad to hear how much their thoughtful and steady approach has meant to you. If you or anyone you know ever needs guidance, we’re always here to help!

reviews.text: Vy is an exceptional person—always steady, trustworthy, and easy to talk to. You can bring up anything, and she’ll give you honest, thoughtful feedback without any judgment. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Vy to anyone who needs help with a personal injury case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Noah, thanks so much for sharing this! We’re glad Vy was able to make a tough situation easier and help you feel supported and informed. That’s exactly the service we strive to provide at Win Nguyen Law. If you ever need anything down the road, don’t hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Vy at Win Nguyen Law after my accident. Vy was incredibly responsive, clear in her communication, and genuinely caring, making the complex legal process understandable and manageable. Thanks to her expertise and diligence, the outcome exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend Vy and Win Nguyen Law to anyone needing a reliable and compassionate personal injury attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Faustina, thank you so much for your thoughtful review! We’re thrilled to hear that Vy was able to guide you clearly and compassionately through the process, and that you’re happy with the outcome. We truly appreciate your recommendation and wish you all the best moving forward!

reviews.text: Where do I even begin! From the moment I contacted Win Nguyen Law, I felt like I was in good hands. Bernice, my case manager, was absolutely amazing. She was patient, kind, and always made sure I understood every step of the process. I had so many questions, and she never once made me feel like a burden. She helped me with what I needed and was always on top of everything. Thanks to her, I felt supported the whole way and got a settlement that truly helped. Can’t recommend this firm enough!
reviews.ownerResponse: Andrea, thank you for sharing your experience! Bernice is fantastic at keeping things clear and making sure every question is answered—she really goes the extra mile for our clients. We're glad you felt supported throughout the process and that we could help you achieve a settlement that made a difference. We appreciate your recommendation and are always here if you or anyone you know needs assistance.

reviews.text:
I’ve had the pleasure of knowing Vy for many years as both a classmate and a close companion. Vy is exceptionally intelligent, honest, and dependable. They consistently offer thoughtful, constructive feedback and approach problems with insight from multiple perspectives.

What truly stands out about Vy is their deep sense of integrity and commitment to supporting others. They not only dedicate time and energy to helping those around them, but also approach every situation with careful thought and a strong sense of justice. When something matters, they are not afraid to speak up and stand their ground.

Their clear thinking and principled character make them someone I would wholeheartedly trust—especially when it comes to matters of personal rights or legal guidance. If I ever needed a recommendation or advice related to personal injury, I wouldn’t hesitate to turn to Vy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Minh, thank you for taking the time to share this. Your words really speak to the kind of person Vy is—and also to the values we strive to uphold at Win Nguyen Law. Vy’s integrity, clarity, and commitment to doing what’s right are exactly what we believe clients deserve from their legal team. It means a lot to see that reflected in your experience with them!

reviews.text: I wasn’t dealing with any case in particular, but I did have some questions about how personal injury law works, and Vy broke it down in a way that I was able to understand. Since my favorite show was Suits and Better Call Saul, they made the show more enjoyable to watch. They didn’t make me feel any lesser for asking, and you could tell they actually care about helping people feel informed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Vy, Thanks for sharing this—we love that Vy made both the law and your favorite shows more enjoyable! It means a lot to us that you felt comfortable asking questions and walked away feeling more informed. That’s exactly the kind of experience we hope to provide, whether you have a case or are just curious.

reviews.text: Initially, I just wanted to ask some quick questions about personal injuries to Vy, but then they went into specifics on how and what legal avenues are available. Overall, it was a great conversation and I would implore people to reach out as well. I was so glad that I found a local firm that could help me so well.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nick, We're so glad to hear Vy was helpful and took the time to walk you through your questions. Even when someone isn’t actively seeking legal help, we believe it’s important to provide honest, clear guidance. Thanks for taking the time to share your experience—we really appreciate it!

reviews.text: I was looking to get help regarding a civil matter and Ian was super helpful! He was able to refer me to a really great resource and I found what I needed! Highly recommend this firm :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Ashlyn! We’re so glad Ian was able to point you in the right direction and that you found what you needed! Even when it’s outside our scope, we do our best to connect people with helpful resources. Thanks for the kind words and recommendation—it means a lot!

reviews.text:
We had a few consultations with Ian and he has been immensely helpful. He was so patient with our many questions. He listened to our whole story and asked us relevant questions that would help us.
He also is genuinely trying to help us save money. He tried to guide us with a solution that doesn’t require court. We would absolutely work with this firm again if needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: J, thank you for your thoughtful feedback. We're so glad Ian was able to provide clarity and guidance during your consultations. His patient, practical approach reflects our firm's values—we always aim to help clients find the most efficient and cost-effective path forward. We appreciate your trust and would be happy to support you again if the need ever arises.

reviews.text: Spoke with Ian on a few matters and he provided superb service and resources. Even on matters that weren’t the firms core practice, he still listened and guided me to resources that could potentially help. He is so patient and genuinely wants to help you like a good friend would. I very much appreciated his help and will definitely recommend Win Nguyen to my social circle if they’re ever in need. Can tell Ian and his team aren’t just trying to make your money and will be honest on your situation!
reviews.ownerResponse: Clinton, thank you for sharing this thoughtful feedback. We're so glad to hear Ian was able to support you with care, patience, and honesty—those values are a big part of how we approach every conversation, even outside our core practice areas. We truly appreciate your trust and kind words, and we’re always here if you or anyone you know ever needs guidance.

reviews.text: My case manager Bernice was truly amazing throughout my personal injury case. She was always kind, patient and consistently made sure I understood everything. She made sure I received the treatment I needed and the settlement I deserved. Her dedication and care made a significant difference during a challenging time. Definitely recommend this firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dulce, thank you for the kind words! Bernice really does go above and beyond to support our clients, and we’re glad her dedication made a difference during a tough time. We appreciate your trust and are so happy we could help you get the care and outcome you deserved.

reviews.text: Someone referred me to Win Nguyen Law after my car accident. I'm very glad I chose them because they did a fantastic job on my case. We were dealing with the toughest insurance company in the business and they faut like tigers and got me more than I expected. I would definitely recommend Win Nguyen Law. Thanks guys!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words! We’re so glad you were referred to us and that we could deliver a result that exceeded your expectations—especially with a tough insurance company on the other side. We’ll always fight hard for our clients. Appreciate your recommendation!

reviews.text:
I have been going to Jim for all my car accidents, and I can confidently say that I will never go anywhere else. After that initial intake call, and sending the case manager all the information, I have total peace of mind that the only thing I need to worry about is getting treatment.

In the last accident, another driver merged into my lane and hit me. She admitted fault at the scene, and profusely apologized, but later told her insurance company that I was the one that merged into her lane. It was extremely upsetting, but Jim and his team didn't back down, fought hard for me, and was able to recover the maximum policy limits for me.

Not only did I get the treatment that i needed to feel better, but I still walked away with money in my pocket. They kept me updated the whole time, and they were able to make a stressful situation so much easier.

I always joke that I hope that I never have to call him again, but when life happens, I know exactly where to go!
reviews.ownerResponse: Jess, thank you for your continued trust and loyalty — it means a great deal that we’ve been able to support you through multiple cases. We know how frustrating it can be when the other party changes their story, and we’re glad we were able to fight through it and secure the outcome you deserved. Our goal is always to take as much of the stress off your plate as possible so you can focus on getting better. And yes — here’s hoping you don’t need us again, but if you ever do, you know we’ll be here, ready to help.

reviews.text: I am truly grateful for the exceptional support I’ve received from this team. They are consistently helpful, kind, and professional, always going above and beyond to provide the assistance you need. In particular, Aida stands out for her compassion and dedication—she has a remarkable way of giving you peace of mind during times when it’s needed most. It’s rare for me to recommend services so highly, but in this case, I can confidently say they deserve a full 10 out of 10. Their commitment to excellence and genuine care for their clients make them a resource I would gladly recommend to anyone.

I recently had the chance to consult with Benjamin Arsenian about a potential civil rights case. He was super attentive and did a great job of explaining everything in a way that made sense to me. Unlike other attorneys I've talked to, Ben actually listened and took the time to understand my situation. His experience and compassion really stood out, and I felt confident in his ability to help me. I'd definitely recommend him to anyone looking for a great attorney.

I had a great experience working with the Law Offices of Benjamin Arsenian. The entire process was smooth and stress-free. The team was incredibly helpful, informative, and always made things easy to understand. Everyone I interacted with was kind and professional. I really appreciated how easy they made everything I highly recommend them!
Ben goes above and beyond, out of his way for you.  Once you are a client, he feels like family.  Always looking out for you.  Thank you so much, Ben!

I had a great experience working with the Law Offices of Benjamin Arsenian. They handled my case when I was rear ended. The whole accident was a nightmare but the best thing I did was contact this law office. The insurance company liable dragged it out for over 2 years but they kept at it and in the end got me a great settlement. They are very professional and have great communication. They got me the medical help I needed starting from the day I called them. Don't wait and call them ASAP, you won't be disappointed.
I have a case from a long time ago the attorney take care this case right away , I never went to court myself , I’m real happy with the results
Excellent service,  I recommend them, they were very helpful and they kept me updated all the time and worked for the best for me..

The office and Attorney were super friendly and helped with my son's dui...
I totally recommend Mr. Arsenian for any criminal charges.  He's very straightforward and fights for you!!!
Best lawyer I know,he helped me gain some hope while I was locked up. What ever he said he would do. He delivered. This lawyer is amazing I highly recommend 💯💯💯

I was a little skeptical at first because the cost for the service was reasonable. However, during the course of my trial Benjamin and his staff were very responsive. He was there to answer any of my questions or concerns. I would recommend him to my friends and family.
Didn’t know where to go for my first time case (DUI), found Ben, and he’s taken care of every bit of it! Communicative, Responsive, and Cares!

I’ve had the best experience with Benjamin Arsenian and his team. Aida his manager is always on tops of everything and very helpful in every question I’ve had through out my case. Benjamin was the best lawyer experience I’ve had in CA, Ben stayed communicated and updated me on any changes in case. The fact that everyone part of his team was so responsive to my concerns made this situation a whole less stressful.

Ben and Aida are the best!!
They are professionals that know the law, and will fight for your rights! If you have been injured and need representation, please at least get a consultation. Meet with them, you will be happy you did!!!

The Law Offices of Benjamin Arsenian is a life saver. Your team has helped my niece to remove the confusion, stress and ambiguity of the law when she was overwhelmed. I highly recommend this team.Thank you Benjamin!

Mr Benjamin, is a  life saver and
Affordable Laywer, He has been our Laywer over two years to my daughter, For DUI and other cases, he’s very honest, And resolve all our problems we don’t have to go to the  court he does it all jobs for you I appreciate him so much and I really recommended him  to others,
Thank you very much Mr Benjamin

been very professional. He has helped out a

recommend.

"Anyone who has been in a car accident knows how stressful it can be, dealing with the other driver, dealing with the insurance companies, etc. Benjamin Arsenian and team made the process so much more bearable than experiences I've had in the past. They guided me through every step of the way with decency and understanding and fought hard to get my case finalized. They made sure the insurance company for the at fault driver, did not steamroll me during the process. In the end, Benjamin went above and beyond to accommodate what I needed.
I don't wish for any of my family or friends to be involved in a personal injury case, however, if it happens,  I would 100% refer them to Benjamin Arsenian and team, to be taken care of and know they are in good hands!"
-J.T.
Great lawyer! He helped me with my case and everything working out well all became of him! Thanks Ben, I recommend to anyone who is looking for anyone

I highly recommended 👌,
Benjamin has resolved my problem!
the best criminal lawyer in orange county !I have known so far, he’s  upfront and helpful’ thank you Benjamin 🙏🏽

Benjamin was so helpful and so professional,I can’t imagine someone better to help ,
He’s 100% out for his clients,
Highly,highly recommended!
Benjamin helped me with my  son's complicated case. I recommend him for his experience and skills to reach the best legal solution.

I was referred to this law firm through a friend, I had never been in any type of accident before so I had no idea where to begin. As soon as I reached out Aida stepped in and was amazing at communicating with me on the process of my case. She did an amazing job. I highly recommend them. They were absolutely on point with everything and made everything really clear so I wasn’t stuck lost on anything. Thank you I appreciate you for all the help 🙏🏽
Benjamin and his team were amazing on my criminal case. They took great care of my first case I decided to return to his office for my second case! Thank you Benjamin and his team for the hard work.

Benjamin Arsenian and his team have helped my friends family and myself through a couple of cases and I will continue to recommend his law office as they are responsive, knowledgeable, and treat their clients like family. Benjamin and his team made me feel comfortable and confident about my case but most of all, he delivered. I can't rave about Ben and his team enough. Anytime I need legal advice/assistance, I only go to Ben.
They treated me very kindly and I really liked the way they handled my case, which ended in my favor.

I am so thankful to Mr Arsenian and his firm for representing, supporting and guiding me with my case. Throughout the process he he proved to be knowledgeable and forthright, answering all questions honestly whether they benefitted him or not. Will 100% recommend!
The absolute best of the best. Extremely knowledgeable and helped me while I was serving in the Military and In a different state. 10/10 recommend.

Ben and his legal team  provided  strong legal advice in the case against me.   Every phone call was answered and was returned in a timely manner.  Ben walked me through the entire legal process, answering any questions I had.
Aida G is very attentive to me and my family and helping us through out the process she answered any and all questions at any time and I will definitely recommend this Law Group in the future
This firm was very professional and helpful with my case. Aida Gonzalez was great at communicating with me and answering all my question and concerns I had. Highly recommend Ben and his team.

I have retained Benjamin and his staff for the second time for a second accident. I was hit by a drunk driver. Benjamin was able to close my case in less then 3 months for policy limits. I received more than I expected from the settlement. Not to mention his staff is extremely helpful.

This firm was awesome with communicating with me on every step of the process. Aida Gonzalez was a tremendous help throughout the whole process. They worked hard on my case! I am extremely satisfied. Highly recommend!!
they are perfecto to represent you on any legal cases. They represented us on a car accicent lawsuit 3 years ago and went back to them this year.
Great service!! Benjamin Arsenian helped me & my family with a case & is really good at what he does! As well, as his staff! Aida G was very helpful & patient with us! I highly recommend them!
Benjamin and his team helped me so much and were so nice. Highly recommend!

I can highly recommend attorney Benjamin Arsenian to represent you for your legal needs.

I have used Mr. Arsenian on more than one accession.  Mr. Arsenian was thorough, professional, competent and extremely helpful  offering me exceptional legal service.  He took extra time to walk me through the process and helped me to understand the components of my cases.

I am very confident that Mr.Arsenian  provided me with outstanding legal representation.

I was in a car accident and the other driver had the nerve to say my mom ran the red light. I was referred to Ben's office by a family member. Ben wasted no time in filing a lawsuit and taking all the necessary steps to make sure to prove we were not at fault and get the other insurance to pay for everything and have money left for myself. Call them if you are in an accident, you wont regret it.

I recommend this office because it is very difficult for me to communicate with people because I do not speak English, and I was delighted that the secretary, Aida, was able to help me with my case and explained everything to me in Spanish so that I could understand my case. I truly appreciate the service and help she provided. I RECOMMEND THEM!!! 100% !!!!!!!!

I recommend this firm for many reasons but most of all the money I was able to get from my case I was able to see that they made it possible that I get every penny that they could and I was clearly explained how hard my case was but they were able to fight it and get me what I deserve!!!!

I was involved in an auto accident in April, a family member referred me to Benjamin Arsenian's office. I was able to get my vehicle repaired in no time. I was reimbursed all of my out of pocket expenses. Not to mention, I was set up with a doctor in less than 24 hours. Once my case was resolved I was able to get all my bills paid and still have money left  over for myself. I would recommend his office to everyone i know.

I was cut off by one car and then rear ended by another but their insurance was trying to put the blame on me. I was recommended to Ben by a friend and I am glad I got a chance to work with him. Him and his paralegal, Aida, gave us updates throughout the whole process and fought with us to give us the best settlement possible. We got a really good settlement and they were able to reduce our medical expenses by a lot to give us the most money we can have. Overall, it was a really good experience and Ben is really personable and great guy. Would recommend to anyone looking for an attorney after a car accident.

Ben is a great, great, great attorney. He works hard and is a real level headed professional, he really helped me in a time of need ... especially against false charges.... thank you so, so much Ben and his team for tolerating me even with my horrible attitude. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Early this year in February my mother was rear ended at an intersection and my youngest daughter was with her. Aside from them being terrified of the accident the thought of dealing with all of the insurance issues was the scariest part but thanks to the professionalism of the Law Offices Of Benjamin Arsemian and staff we were able to get the medical assistance they both needed and our claims processed. His staff was so friendly and helpful from the beginning to the end. No question was a dumb question to them. They answered all of our questions and concerns and helped us get thru it all smoothly. PLEASE READ;If you're dealing with a workers' comp case and already having a tough time, reconsider choosing this office as they make things harder. Do yourself a favor and find another attorney. I regret not paying attention to negative reviews before hiring them.

These individuals prioritize their interests over mine. Before signing the contract, they told me everything I wanted to hear. Once signed, I faced the reality of being ignored. When I tried to contact the owner, he was unprofessional and unhelpful.

When I hired them, I had a settled case with ongoing monthly payments. I simply wanted an attorney to help find a doctor for my follow-up appointments through telemedicine. They didn't find a new doctor, ignored my calls and emails, and were disrespectful. And eventually Due to miscommunication with the travelers and not paying attention to my case, I lost my payment. and my case got messed up.

After nine frustrating months, I terminated my contract with them. I had to handle negotiations on my own, and it took almost a year to settle the case. Despite my case lasting three years, Montoya Law represented me for only nine months, doing nothing beneficial and even stopping my payments. When discussing fees with Ruben, he was unprofessional, demanded too much money, and refused negotiations, leading to a court dispute.
UPDATE: I want to emphasize that the above statement reflects my personal experience with the business and is not meant to harm their reputation but to share my honest feedback. I received a message from Ruben M, who identified as the business owner, after posting this review. The message included threats and demands to delete my review, further highlighting the unprofessionalism I experienced during my interactions with the business.

It is crucial for consumers to be aware of potential challenges they may face when choosing this business, especially if dealing with workers' compensation cases. I encourage others to carefully consider their options and take into account negative reviews as they may provide valuable insights into the business's practices.

In sharing my experience, I hope to contribute to the improvement of the overall customer experience and encourage open communication between clients and businesses. However, I want to reiterate that this review is based on my subjective perspective, and others may have different experiences with the business.

Update: I am writing this after the business owner responded to my review. I expected the owner to reply to my review, but I never expected him to bend the truth for his benefit. I don't want to engage in back-and-forth on this matter, But I have all my written communications with Montoya Law, which dispute his statements.
reviews.ownerResponse: This are the true facts.  When we were hired her benefits had stopped due to her not getting medical job status because she moved to Europe.    We obtained a state doctor prior to that we basically did all the foundation for her claim.  We got a doctor to issue a telemed reports.  We got her benefits reinstated. Believing that she did not have to pay for services rendered she fired us (2020).  Of course we filed a lien on case for work performed.  She made an offer to settle our lien which we accepted.  She then neglected agreement and we proceeded to court.  The judge recommended a higher amount.  She objected and to put this issue to rest we agreed to a lower amount.  She never issued a complaint about our services when we represented her.  She gave a negative review after she had to pay attorney fees.  Was it the representation or the fact that she had to pay for a service that she is complaining about?

reviews.ownerResponse: This review is false. We do not push any client to settle.  If the claim is denied we fight to get it accepted. We maximize the settlement in all our cases unless the client demands we settle.  Like I always state to our clients “we work for you. You do not work for us.”   So if a client settled that is because the client instructed us to do so.  If the claim is denied we notify our clients to apply for state disability while we fight claim.  Any of our clients will support this facts.  I welcome you to provide your real name (we do not have a client by the name stated in your profile) so we can adequately address your concern. Send us a letter that you waive attorney client privilege and we can have an open debate of what “really happened” in your case based on evidence.

Please provide name.  We do not have any clients by that name you have posted.  We have had issues with competitors issuing false reviews.  Providing additional information from real clients help us address issues and making sure that we learn from them.

Team Rawa Law, not only were they responsive, professional, and attentive to my concerns, they kept me advised every step of the way. I felt like this wasn't just another lawyer trying to blow through a case and collect. We discussed procedures together. Planned our case road map together.
